heading: Omitted
label: 571 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , which directed the Secretary of the Interior to prepare a membership roll of the Shoshone Tribe, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.act July 27, 1939, ch. 387, § 153 Stat. 1128
